class.name: RadioButton
class.brief_description: A button that represents a binary choice.
class.description: [RadioButton] is a toggle button displayed as a radio button. It's similar to [CheckBox] in functionality, but it has a different appearance. To follow established UX patterns, it's recommended to use [RadioButton] when it must be an exclusive choice through an assigned [member BaseButton.button_group]. For example, it can be used when deciding what rendering method to use on a new project. See also [ToggleButton] and [BaseButton] which contains common properties and methods associated with this node.
